title: 秋華賞の後に・アイツのいる場所へ

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That race felt... amazing! Was that great or what,
Teach?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hishi Amazon was so cool out there!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she'll run against Narita Brian
someday. Now that would be a race to watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The audience's excitement mounts over a
potential battle of the greats.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Here we have Hishi Amazon, a racer who's been
turning heads with her strong performance in the
Tiara tour. Congrats on your fantastic Shuka Sho
run!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks a lot! It was really satisfying to get
out there and go one-on-one with such strong
opponents!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Now, I finally feel ready!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: ...Ready? Could you please elaborate?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Nothing gets me fired up like a good rival—and there's someone in the Twinkle Series that I just have to face.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The room is stirred into a frenzy just by her name
alone. After all, she's a beast of a runner who's
currently taking the world by storm.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Thing is, I realized last year that I wasn't good
enough yet to put up a decent fight.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So I made the decision to take on the Tiara tour
and make myself even better!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And now, I've blasted through the Tiara tour and
finally reached a level I can be proud of!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm ready, it's time to declare total war
on Narita Brian and give her a run for her money!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Oh! Does this mean your next race will be—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You betcha! It's gonna be the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like we're in for the dramatic clash
everyone's been waiting for!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
While we've got the camera rolling, is there
anything you want to tell Narita Brian?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon looks directly at the camera, her
eyes absolutely burning with competitive spirit.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Brian. I've been tryin' to catch up to you all
this time, itching to go one-on-one at the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm the Hishi Amazon, and I'm gonna give you everything I've got, so just you wait!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You got that, Teach?! Get ready for some
high-octane power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Word of her bold declaration spreads like wildfire
from news outlet to news outlet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh. The Arima Kinen, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stage is set. The one-on-one we've been
preparing for is just around the corner. And now,
we're staring down the homestretch.
